institution.name: Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo
institution.address: Hwy 2 Km 80.4, Bo San Daniel Sector Las Canelas

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 48% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.3k vs 4.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo rose 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.8k → $9.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (32.4% → 38.9%).
